name: Neovim Tools (neovim, ripgrep, fzf)
description: Installs neovim, ripgrep, and fzf from GitHub releases

neovimVersion.description: Version of neovim to install (e.g. 'v0.10.4' or 'latest')

ripgrepVersion.description: Version of ripgrep to install (e.g. '14.1.1' or 'latest')

fzfVersion.description: Version of fzf to install (e.g. 'v0.62.0' or 'latest')
